case_title: ALI AHMED ABDULLAH ESMAIL VS. CAMERON LOZADA ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF ALI AHMED ABDULLAH ESMAIL IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY ARABIC INTERPRETER NABIL ABDELFATTAH. DEFENDANT CAMERON LOZADA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS OLIVIA GRACE GERVAIS (VIA ZOOM) AND STATE FARM INSURANCE REPRESENTED BY MICHELLE KING ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HIS CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT CAMERON LOZADA. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2024 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM AMILED TO DEFENDANT OKIVIA GRACE GERVAIS RETURNED: ATTEPMTED, NOT KNOWN.
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE AUG-30-2024 SC-100 MAIL TO DEFENDANT(OLIVIA GRACE GERVAIS) (ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-31-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALI AHMED ABDULLAH ESMAIL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS CAMERON LOZADA AND OLIVIA GRACE GERVAIS ARE NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY ARABIC INTERPRETER HANY FARAG. PLAINTIFF IS REQUESTING TO AMEND HIS CLAIM TO INCLUDE STATE FARM INSURANCE. PLAINTIFF OLIVIA GRACE GERVAIS WAS SERVED. PLAINTIFF CAMERON LOZADA WAS NOT SERVED PROPERLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
